languages.text: "Убийство лорда Гапрак — часть заговора против вас, организованного Ювенной".

traits.locale_text: "Убийство лорда Гапрак — часть заговора против вас, организованного Ювенной".

languages.text: "The Gaprak lord's murder is part of a plot against you orchestrated by Juvenna."
languages.original_text: "Убийство лорда Гапрак — часть заговора против вас, организованного Ювенной".

languages.text: "Die Ermordung des Gaprak-Lords ist Teil einer von Juvenna geschmiedeten Intrige gegen Euch."
languages.original_text: "The Gaprak lord's murder is part of a plot against you orchestrated by Juvenna."

traits.locale_text: "Die Ermordung des Gaprak-Lords ist Teil einer von Juvenna geschmiedeten Intrige gegen Euch."

languages.text: “尤文娜精心策划了一场针对你的阴谋，杀害贾帕克大人正是其中一环。”
languages.original_text: "The Gaprak lord's murder is part of a plot against you orchestrated by Juvenna."

traits.locale_text: “尤文娜精心策划了一场针对你的阴谋，杀害贾帕克大人正是其中一环。”

languages.text: « Le meurtre du seigneur Gaprak fait partie d'une conspiration ourdie par Juvenna contre vous. »
languages.original_text: "The Gaprak lord's murder is part of a plot against you orchestrated by Juvenna."

traits.locale_text: « Le meurtre du seigneur Gaprak fait partie d'une conspiration ourdie par Juvenna contre vous. »

languages.text: «El asesinato del noble Gaprak forma parte de un complot contra usted orquestado por Juvenna».
languages.original_text: "The Gaprak lord's murder is part of a plot against you orchestrated by Juvenna."

traits.locale_text: «El asesinato del noble Gaprak forma parte de un complot contra usted orquestado por Juvenna».

languages.text: "Gaprak lordunun cinayeti, Juvenna'nın sana karşı kurduğu komplonun bir parçası."
languages.original_text: "The Gaprak lord's murder is part of a plot against you orchestrated by Juvenna."

traits.locale_text: "Gaprak lordunun cinayeti, Juvenna'nın sana karşı kurduğu komplonun bir parçası."

languages.text: 「ギャプラク卿の暗殺は、ジュベナが仕組んだあなたへの陰謀の一部です」
languages.original_text: "The Gaprak lord's murder is part of a plot against you orchestrated by Juvenna."

traits.locale_text: 「ギャプラク卿の暗殺は、ジュベナが仕組んだあなたへの陰謀の一部です」
